evaluation.summary: The test failed to compute the LDAB correction factor for primorial bases beyond k=1, producing integer modulo errors and no evidence of a genuine precision anomaly.
next_directions: Resolve the integer modulo by zero error in the LDAB computation for larger primorial bases
Validate the relative error calculation with higher precision arithmetic and controlled rounding
Explore alternative formulations of the LDAB correction factor to avoid singularities at primorial indices
